condensed_summary: Turns v0.1 into a stricter execution protocol with fixed phases, required tags, evidence levels, and grading hooks. Use this version for live execution; keep v0.1 as the glossary and philosophy layer behind it.
hard_rules: If signal is black, the path is disallowed and must not be executed.
If signal is red, execution requires an override or fallback path.
If mode is implement, schema must already exist or be created first.
If a critical claim is inferred or speculative, the signal must be yellow or red.
If done_criteria are absent, task status is provisional only.
If blocker conditions are met, stop and emit BLOCKER rather than guessing.
If output_format is json_only, all responses must be valid JSON objects.
minimal_xml_template: <session version="0.2"><role>sr_game_dev</role><engine>godot 4.x</engine><mode>implement</mode><signal state="yellow" reason="needs verification"/><objective>exact task here</objective><scope>systems and files here</scope><constraints>repo_constrained; json_only</constraints><context_lock>approved context only</context_lock><schema>required input and output contract</schema><validation type="consistency" required="true">checks here</validation><done_criteria>completion conditions here</done_criteria><output_format>json_only</output_format></session>
